description_long: This object is a tall, utilitarian street light commonly found in urban environments. It features a straight, cylindrical pole made of metal, with a smooth, unadorned surface and a slightly darker base, likely for weather resistance. At the top, a single, gently curved arm extends outward, supporting a streamlined, modern lamp head. The lamp head is elongated and oval-shaped, with a flat underside that likely houses the light source and a subtle diffuser for even illumination. The overall design is functional and minimal, prioritizing durability and effective area lighting. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing its practical role in public infrastructure.
description: A tall, plain metal street light with a curved arm and a modern, oval lamp head. The design is minimal and functional, suitable for urban streets.
description_view_0: The street light is seen from a three-quarter angle, showing the full length of the pole and the curved arm with the lamp head extending to the right.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the narrow profile of the pole and the lamp head, with the arm and lamp head appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: Another three-quarter view, mirroring view 0, with the curved arm and lamp head extending to the left.
description_view_3: A direct side view from the opposite side of view 1, again showing the pole and the lamp head in a thin profile.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, elongated oval lamp head with a flat underside and integrated diffuser, no decorative elements.
